mapper.select: SELECT l.*, u.name AS loggedbyusername FROM plugin_itam_log l LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = l.loggedbyuserid WHERE l.deviceid = #{deviceId} AND l.customerid = #{customerId} AND l.deletedat IS NULL ORDER BY l.createdat DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO plugin_itam_log ( id, customerid, deviceid, devicenumber, ownername, ownershipdate, assetstatus, devicecondition, batterycondition, comments, pictures, loggedbyuserid, createdat ) VALUES ( gen_random_uuid(), #{customerId}, #{deviceId}, #{deviceNumber}, #{ownerName}, #{ownershipDate}, #{assetStatus}, #{deviceCondition}, #{batteryCondition}, #{comments}, #{pictures, typeHandler=com.hmdm.plugins.itam.persistence.typehandler.JsonStringListTypeHandler}, #{loggedByUserId}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT l.*, u.name AS loggedbyusername FROM plugin_itam_log l LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = l.loggedbyuserid WHERE l.id = CAST(#{id} AS UUID) AND l.customerid = #{customerId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM plugin_itam_log WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS UUID) AND customerid = #{customerId}
mapper.select: SELECT d.id, d.number, d.info::json ->> 'model' AS model, COALESCE(d.info::json ->> 'serial', d.imei) AS serial, d.info::json ->> 'androidVersion' AS androidversion, to_timestamp(d.lastupdate / 1000.0) AS lastcheckin FROM devices d WHERE d.customerid = #{customerId} AND ( d.number ILIKE '%' || #{query} || '%' OR d.imei ILIKE '%' || #{query} || '%' OR d.info::json ->> 'serial' ILIKE '%' || #{query} || '%' ) ORDER BY d.number LIMIT 20

SELECT d.id, d.number, d.info::json ->> 'model' AS model, COALESCE(d.info::json ->> 'serial', d.imei) AS serial, d.info::json ->> 'androidVersion' AS androidversion, to_timestamp(d.lastupdate / 1000.0) AS lastcheckin FROM devices d WHERE d.id = #{deviceId} AND d.customerid = #{customerId}
